dock_hauling.name: Dock Hauling
dock_hauling.description: Move cargo crates off a freighter. Honest, aching work.

grid_gig.name: Data-Runner Gig
grid_gig.description: Ferry an encrypted packet across the Grid. No questions asked.

bloom_tending.name: Garden Tending
bloom_tending.description: Help coax the conservatory's more temperamental flora into bloom.

shallows_set.name: Play a Set
shallows_set.description: Fill in for a no-show act at a Shallows music venue.

citadel_clerk.name: Records Correction Clerk
citadel_clerk.description: Six hours in a Ministry Holdings annex, bringing old records into agreement with the present. The past was different this morning; by lunch it never was. Pays well enough not to ask.
